div1.entryFree: Thewes or Thews, muscles and sinews, bodily strength: care I for the limb, the t., the stature, bulk, and big assemblance of a man? H4B III, 2, 276. Romans now have t. and limbs like to their ancestors, Caes. I, 3, 81. nature, crescent, does not grow alone in t. and bulk, Hml. I, 3, 12.
